The '''Obsidian Lance''' was a spear-like weapon that was fabricated from [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar's]] sharpest [[Obsidian/Legends|obsidian]] and crafted by the [[Mustafarian/Legends|Mustafarians]]. They were often decorated with runes and sigils, which were carved onto the central shaft of the weapon. The '''Oppressor obsidian polearm''' was a variant of the weapon.

==Behind the scenes==
The Obsidian Lance appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}}
